texto: I think that what's been holding composers back a great deal is that they feel they must have a new style every year. This, in my case, would be hopeless. In fact, it is said that I have no style at all, but that doesn't matter. I just go on doing, as they say, my thing. I believe this takes a certain courage.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Samuel Barber sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. A afirmação “I think that what's been holding composers back a great deal is that they feel they must have a n…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, great, style, útil em momentos de style e believe.

frase_original: I think that what's been holding composers back a great deal is that they feel they must have a new style every year. This, in my case, would be hopeless. In fact, it is said that I have no style at all, but that doesn't matter. I just go on doing, as they say, my thing. I believe this takes a certain courage.
